stemHtml: In the event that a controlled flight inadvertently deviates from its track given in the current flight plan, action should be taken in order to…

options.a: adjust the heading of the aircraft to regain track as soon as practicable.
options.b: climb or descend by 500 ft, inform the appropriate ATS unit.
options.c: notify the appropriate ATS unit immediately of the new track and comply with their instructions.
options.d: maintain VMC, wait for instructions from the appropriate ATS unit.
